title: Smoky Fluffy Argentinian Rice Pilaf
description: This energizing dish features dark brown sugar and a tadka (spices) to add smokiness to the fluffy Argentinian rice pilaf, making it gluten-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 3 cups long-grain white rice
ingredients.notes: Rinse thoroughly to remove excess starch.

instructions: Rinse the rice in cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds.
Add brown sugar, salt (if using), and lemon zest to the pan. Stir well to combine.
Pour in the rinsed rice and stir until coated with the mixture.
Gradually add water or broth while stirring constantly to prevent lumps from forming.
Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for an additional 10 minutes. Fluff with a fork before serving.
